characters.name: king iotate
characters.desc: The king of this empire, which is also your father.

dialogues.about princess: I also do not know where your sister go. She just disappeared without me knowing.
dialogues.about duke: The last time I see him is when your sister disappeared four years ago.
dialogues.about black pearl: That is the power of you that I have sealed when you were small. I think it is time for you to claim back your power.

characters.name: guard
characters.desc: A guard that is very wary of you.

dialogues.about library: This is the Heaven Realm library. I need to guard this library from unknown existence
dialogues.about qing: The old man is the librarian. His job is to tidy up the books and guard the prisoner

characters.name: old man qing
characters.desc: An old man from one of the pictures in the locked castle corridor.

dialogues.about unnudh: I captured her 4 years ago since she is a ferocious beast. But, after seeing her behavior these years, I think I should not imprison her. Nevertheless, this is for the best of the world. So, I did not let her go.
dialogues.about huz: He is the youngest divine beasts among us. However, after the Great War last century, he went missing
dialogues.about divine beast: There are 4 divine beasts in the current era: Bhu, Xuan, Huz, and me. We are assigned to eradicate the evil caused by ferocious beasts

characters.name: princess unnudh
characters.desc: Your sister, the princess that has been captured by an unknown person 4 years ago.

dialogues.imprisonment time: I was in here for about 4 years. I never got out from this cell
dialogues.imprisonment treatment: I got food everyday. I also got books so that I was not bored. However, I was still missing Father, Uncle, and you a lot.

characters.name: assassin xuan
characters.desc: An assassin with black long hair and black eyes.

dialogues.about huz: You may already know that you are Huz. But, I suppose you are also Otuwa now, one of the ferocious beasts. When I killed Iotate, I cannot bear to also kill you, so I left you there.
dialogues.about otuwa: The original Otuwa has been killed by the divine beasts in the last war. So, I do not know why you can yield his power
dialogues.about ferocious beast: A bunch of killers that murder people, even children, to achieve their goal. Even your so-called father, has murdered about 1000 people this year.
dialogues.about inqigo: I never heard of it since the last war. I thought his power is already weakened.

characters.name: general bhu
characters.desc: A middle aged man, a great fighter.

characters.name: duke inqigo
characters.desc: The one-eyed duke with a dangerous smile

dialogues.about huz: Yeah, we captured you in the last war. Then, we transferred Otuwa's heart into your body. Some of Otuwa's power is sealed in the black pearl, but I suppose you already have it in your body now. So, now, you are already a ferocious beast.
dialogues.about ferocious beast: We are the best in the world. No human or beast should interrupt us. We should be the ruler of the world!
dialogues.about divine beast: They already hinder our plans a bunch of time. So, I always wanted to kill them
dialogues.about unnudh: I already swallowed her. She refused to hear my commands, so I just use her to increase my power. It is a pity that your father power is being taken by that Xuan. Otherwise, I can be more powerful.
